'''Sam Heggs''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]].

==Biography==
He was possibly from [[Vasch]], and had been to the [[Gansett Zoo]]. He enjoyed [[Vaschean rye/Legends|Vaschean rye]], and had perhaps once seen a time warp while hunting [[Grumph]] on [[Nimba Five]]. However, as he told the story just to distract [[Jeet Travis]], it was possibly all made up.<ref name="Heggs' Tale" />
